narrative:
Harrison Township has 2,618 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
